name: roll_360_check
description: Roll equivalent of yaw_360_check.json/pitch_360_check.json -- not for pixel-tracking, a before/after landmark-position check instead. Holds full roll for exactly 360/200=1.8s, the duration a full rotation should take at the coded maxAngVel.roll (200 deg/s, matching shipTypes.ts's own 'confirms the 200 deg/s spec' measurement note). Unlike yaw/pitch, roll's angle model (analysis/angle_convert.py's --axis roll, polar angle around frame center) is EXACT geometry with no FOV/focal-length calibration involved at all, so this check can't be confounded by the same calibration-bug class the pitch check caught -- only needs the landmark's pixel position before and after, converted via atan2 around frame center, no fov_deg dependency.
